rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Banned words — grep zero-tolerance
rules_evaluated.evidence: No instances of: honest, delve, landscape (verb), importantly, crucial, substrate, leverage (verb), synergize, paradigm shift. Register is clean.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Ritual / practice (noun) / ceremony — hard ban
rules_evaluated.evidence: No instances of 'practice' (noun), 'ritual', 'ceremony'. Line 36 uses 'habit' which is permitted.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: No stale markers, no 'fixed' retrospectives, no session biography
rules_evaluated.evidence: No outdated markers, no 'NOTE: outdated', no 'MOVED' blocks, no session-date references in rule bodies.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Register match
rules_evaluated.evidence: Agents 101 voice trio present: Sutherland reframe (lines 5-7: naming the student's instinct 'tracing everything by hand' before redirecting), Godin warmth (line 24: 'Then use the answer'), Siilasmaa optimism (line 36: 'That's the habit' points to what becomes possible). No consultancy register drift.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Credit the original when paraphrasing a named technique
rules_evaluated.evidence: Diagnostic framework (sources/processing/boundary) is presented as the lecture's own pedagogical move, not imported from a named technique. Credit obligation does not fire.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Training creator's name banned in student-facing body
rules_evaluated.evidence: No 'Antti', 'the creator', 'the author', 'the training designer' in body. Maintainer block is exempt.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Author-we ban — first-person-plural extension
rules_evaluated.evidence: No author-we instances. Line 38 ('The agent is part of the debugging loop too') is impersonal. Clean.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Belief reference by name not number
rules_evaluated.evidence: Maintainer block (line 44) correctly names strategic role via concept, not numbered reference.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Lecture meta belongs below maintainer cut
rules_evaluated.evidence: Placement (line 42), Strategic role (lines 44-45), Voice target (line 46) all correctly below <!-- maintainer --> at line 40.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Always you, never the student
rules_evaluated.evidence: Body uses imperative and second-person consistently. Maintainer uses third-person appropriately.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Don't smuggle terms of art from maintainer into body
rules_evaluated.evidence: Terms used in body (retriever, stance, synthesis, boundary, rule) are either operational or earned at point of use. No maintainer-only vocabulary leak.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Over-hedge detector
rules_evaluated.evidence: No reassurance-shaped sentences (no 'it's OK if', 'no penalty', 'fine way to'). Prose is direct: 'Start with diagnosis before repair. That's the habit.'

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Punchy framing keeps its punch; carve-out lives downstream
rules_evaluated.evidence: Line 5 'Do not start by tracing everything by hand' is punchy and line 7 leads directly to the move. No over-softening.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Value-prop / positioning framing belongs in sales copy + strategy docs, NOT student-facing body
rules_evaluated.evidence: Lines 5-7 employ Sutherland-style negation naming the student's NATURAL INSTINCT (manual tracing) before redirecting to the pedagogical move (prompt for diagnosis). Per rule 13 diagnostic: negation serves the LEARNER (pedagogy), not the BUYER (positioning-defense). This is core Agents 101 voice, not positioning leak. DIAGNOSTIC TEST PASSES: 'Do not start by tracing everything by hand' is pedagogical redirection of a known struggle, not buyer-pitched positioning-defense.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Watch out for planting jargon too early
rules_evaluated.evidence: Terms used (retriever, stance, synthesis, boundary) are operational at M3 level. No premature jargon-planting detected. Diagnostics (source/processing/boundary problems) are earned immediately after introduction.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: No combative verbs about the agent in body prose
rules_evaluated.evidence: Agent language is peer-flat: 'the agent tried to use' (line 17), 'the agent is part of' (line 38). No combative verbs.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Aspirational destination, never corrective gap
rules_evaluated.evidence: Framing is forward (recovery move after multi-agent coordination), not corrective gap. Student leaves with diagnostic agency.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Earn every technical term on first use
rules_evaluated.evidence: Root cause and problem categories (source/processing/boundary) are operationally defined in the numbered framework immediately after introduction. No cold jargon.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Business-audience word ban (Agents 101 default)
rules_evaluated.evidence: No unearned tech jargon. Register is engineering-direct, appropriate for Agents 101 builder leader.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Memory vs context — use deliberately
rules_evaluated.evidence: Neither term invoked; rule does not apply.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Golden path only in the body
rules_evaluated.evidence: No troubleshooting branches. Forward-path teaching: diagnose, then apply fixes by category.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Q1/Q2/Q3 retro banned at every module
rules_evaluated.evidence: File is a mini-lecture, not a module Debrief. Rule does not apply.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: No em-dashes. Simple sentences.
rules_evaluated.evidence: No em-dashes in body. Short, simple sentences throughout.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Section headers use command verbs when section is about doing
rules_evaluated.evidence: File is a standalone lecture without internal h2 sections. Module file that includes this will carry header verbs.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: LLM-vs-agent-vs-Claude vocabulary discipline
rules_evaluated.evidence: Correct usage: 'the agent tried to use data' (line 17, multi-step acting), 'Ask Claude' (line 7, addressee). Clean discipline.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: No placeholders inside fenced blocks
rules_evaluated.evidence: Fenced block (lines 11-20) contains no [BRACKETS] placeholders. Fully deterministic instruction.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Every prompt block gets a one-sentence action lead-in
rules_evaluated.evidence: Line 7: 'Start by prompting the system to find the root cause.' Under 20 words; semantic summary. Leading context established.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Canonical presentation shape — lead-in, label with destination, blank line, fenced block
rules_evaluated.evidence: Shape correct: lead-in (lines 5-7), '**Prompt** *(Claude Code)*' label (line 9), blank (line 10), fenced block (lines 11-20).

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Installed Claude Code Skills invoke by name, never by path
rules_evaluated.evidence: Prompt block does not invoke any skill. No path-leak.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Chain prompts by back-reference and deterministic path
rules_evaluated.evidence: Single prompt, not a chain. Rule does not apply.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Markdown shout inside fenced blocks is dead weight
rules_evaluated.evidence: No **bold** or *italic* inside fence. Numbered list and plain text only.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Self-critique register, not defense, when Claude interrogates its own work
rules_evaluated.evidence: Prompt uses critique-register framing: 'Tell me whether', 'Show me the failure chain'. Interrogative, not defensive.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Mood contract named
rules_evaluated.evidence: Maintainer (line 44): Module lesson is 'multi-agent systems fail at seams you can inspect and improve.' M3 unsettled-competence mood is honored with epistemic unease + recovery agency.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Epistemic mood ≠ punitive mood
rules_evaluated.evidence: Mood is 'I don't yet know how to fix this' (not-knowing), not 'I broke it' (shame). Invites agency through diagnostic discipline.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Lead with the discipline, not the failure mode
rules_evaluated.evidence: Lead is 'Start by prompting the system' (the discipline: diagnosis). Not 'Agents get stuck' (failure). Big Idea is positive frame.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Sales-copy rules do not apply to student-facing curriculum
rules_evaluated.evidence: File is Agents 101 student-facing curriculum, not buyer copy. Category exemption.

summary: PASS. All compendium rules fire clean. Agents 101 voice trio is correctly deployed: Sutherland pedagogical reframe of student instinct at lines 5-7 (NOT positioning-defense per rule 13 diagnostic), Godin warmth throughout, Siilasmaa forward-optimism (line 36). Prompt mechanics are canonical. Mood contract honors M3 unsettled-competence with epistemic unease + diagnostic recovery. No banned words, no maintainer leaks, no jargon-planting, no author-we. Ship-ready.
